text.title: Freelance Proposal Template Core Rules
text.summary: 8 testable rules with rationale + source for freelance-proposal-template. Includes terminal skip-this-methodology rule.

rule.statement: Proposal MUST contain a scope envelope: WHAT IS INCLUDED, WHAT IS EXCLUDED. Exclusions section is mandatory; absent exclusions is a forbidden pattern.
rule.rationale: Fixed-bid scope-control research — applies to Freelance Proposal Template.

rule.statement: Each assumption the bid depends on MUST be listed with a confirm-by date; un-confirmed assumptions auto-trigger renegotiation.
rule.rationale: Assumption-management practice — applies to Freelance Proposal Template.

rule.statement: Payment is broken into at least three milestones; final milestone is at most 30% of total to align incentives.
rule.rationale: Freelance cash-flow research — applies to Freelance Proposal Template.

rule.statement: Proposal pins a change-request hourly rate (usually 1.5× base rate) and a minimum block (often 1 hour); scope-creep is priced, not absorbed.
rule.rationale: Outsource governance practice — applies to Freelance Proposal Template.

rule.statement: Late payment beyond NET-30 incurs interest at a stated rate; work pauses at NET-45.
rule.rationale: Freelance payment-protection practice — applies to Freelance Proposal Template.

rule.statement: IP transfers to the client only upon final payment; pre-payment, all work remains the BA's IP.
rule.rationale: IP transfer best practice — applies to Freelance Proposal Template.

rule.statement: Proposal expires in 14 days; after that, terms (rate, availability) may change without notice.
rule.rationale: Sales-cycle hygiene — applies to Freelance Proposal Template.

rule.statement: If you are not bidding fixed-scope freelance work, return `skipped`.
rule.rationale: Methodology applicability — applies to Freelance Proposal Template.
